case_title: BONNIE PAN VS. WYNDHAM HOTEL MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PAN, BONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT WYNDHAM HOTEL MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN, BONNIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN, BONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT WYNDHAM HOTEL MANAGEMENT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-02-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WYNDHAM HOTEL MANAGEMENT, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA HO FILED BY PAN, BONNIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAN, BONNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WYNDHAM HOTEL MANAGEMENT, INC. BONNIE PAN IS NOT THE CORRECT PLAINTIFF AS SHE DID NOT INCUR ANY DAMAGES AS THE RESULT OF DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF PAN, BONNIE
